ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hotel */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the hotel */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Standard check-in time for the hotel */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Standard check-out time for the hotel */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel the room belongs to */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the room can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the room */,
  "price" TEXT /* Base price of the room per night */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the room */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number where the room is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel the booking is for */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the customer */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy applicable to the booking */,
  "reservation_number" TEXT /* Unique reservation number for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is part of the loyalty program */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings made by the customer */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer on bookings */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., room type, amenities, check-in time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking the history entry is for */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., room type, arrival date) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
